form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won by half a length at Shepparton (22.15) beating Paw Alia in a Mix 6/7 on March 23. Must be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won by half a length at Shepparton (22.15) beating Paw Alia in a Mix 6/7 on March 23. Must be included.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording three minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when second (24.02) over 425m at Bendigo. Has run slick time here with a 23.32 PB at the distance. Go close.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by one length at this track over 485m (27.39) beating Dynamite Eric in Mix 6/7 on March 31. Others have better credentials.

form.formComment: Last start winner at Warrnambool over 390m running a time of 22.26. Looks to have an edge on most of these.

formComments.comment: Last start winner at Warrnambool over 390m running a time of 22.26. Looks to have an edge on most of these.

form.formComment: Form has been strong with wins two and three starts back. Last time out finished 2nd on March 31 over 410m at this track behind Paw Farina beaten 1.3 lengths (23.42) in a Grade 5. Tempted to look elsewhere.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been strong with wins two and three starts back. Last time out finished 2nd on March 31 over 410m at this track behind Paw Farina beaten 1.3 lengths (23.42) in a Grade 5. Tempted to look elsewhere.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Shepparton (22.56) in a Grade 5, finishing a 4.5 lengths seventh. Has two successes and two minors from seven starts from box 6. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.
